2017 CONTENTS Keil Keil on the Instructional computers Keil ---- Keil from ARM (http://www.keil.com/) is a software development environment for ARM Cortex-M based microcontrollers. Keil on the Instructional computers -------------------

on the Instructional computers ----------------------------------- Keil is installed in some EECS instuctional labs, typically for EE192. ARM generously donates the licenses for the class to Prof. Lee. EECS Instructional Support 378
. Lee. EECS Instructional Support 378/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
